creator: msmith@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


It's typically not appropriate to file PRs against -current, especially 
for work in progress.   The ACPI CA subsystem has been updated at least 
once since this PR was filed, so it's already stale. 

Discussion for ACPI issues should either be taken to current@freebsd.org 
or to acpi-jp@jp.freebsd.org.  The first thing I'm going to ask is  
whether you have updated your BIOS to the latest available for this 
board (1006a).
